name: RABBIT-FEATURE-SCOPE-BUG-9
title: No test verifies invariant 2 (Agent uses default model, no Opus override)
description: Spec invariant 2 mandates the dispatched Agent uses the default model with no Opus override. SKILL.md documents it but no test asserts that the prompt or skill avoids requesting Opus, opus-4, claude-opus, or model overrides. Add a test that greps for forbidden model override patterns.

history.note: Fixed in Wave 3 PR. BUG-21 hardcoded names removed; BUG-28 defensive .get() for optional keys; BUG-7/9/12/14/17 covered by new test-invariant-coverage.py.
